ucs.title: [LLM] APT37 (ScarCruft) RokRat C2 over legitimate cloud-storage APIs (pCloud / Yandex Disk / Dropbox / Google Drive)
ucs.description: Hunts ScarCruft's signature C2/exfil pattern: RokRat (and successors DOGCALL, M2RAT) abuse legitimate cloud-storage REST APIs as bidirectional channels — uploading screenshots/keylog data and pulling next-stage payloads via OAuth-tokened HTTPS. The high-fidelity twist is the *initiating process*: short-lived script interpreters (powershell.exe, mshta.exe, wscript.exe) or rundll32-loaded DLLs hitting api.pcloud.com / cloud-api.yandex.net / api.dropboxapi.com / www.googleapis.com directly — never via a browser.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(All_Traffic.dest) as dest values(All_Traffic.dest_port) as dest_port values(All_Traffic.bytes_out) as bytes_out from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic where (All_Traffic.dest_category="cloud_storage" OR All_Traffic.app IN ("pcloud","yandex_disk","dropbox","google_drive") OR query(All_Traffic.dest) IN ("api.pcloud.com","eapi.pcloud.com","cloud-api.yandex.net","webdav.yandex.ru","api.dropboxapi.com","content.dropboxapi.com","www.googleapis.com")) by All_Traffic.src host All_Traffic.process_name All_Traffic.process_path _time span=1m | rename All_Traffic.* as * | search process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","mshta.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","cmd.exe") NOT process_path IN ("*\\Program Files\\*","*\\Program Files (x86)\\*") | join type=inner host process_name [| tstats summariesonly=true count from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name IN ("explorer.exe","outlook.exe","hwp.exe","hword.exe","hcell.exe") by Processes.dest Processes.process_name Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process | rename Processes.dest as host Processes.process_name as process_name Processes.process as cmdline] | stats min(firstTime) as firstTime max(lastTime) as lastTime sum(count) as conn_count sum(bytes_out) as total_out values(dest) as dests values(cmdline) as cmdlines by host src process_name parent_process_name | where conn_count >= 3 AND total_out > 5000 | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime)
ucs.kql:
let CloudC2Hosts = dynamic(["api.pcloud.com","eapi.pcloud.com","cloud-api.yandex.net","webdav.yandex.ru","disk.yandex.com","api.dropboxapi.com","content.dropboxapi.com","www.googleapis.com","oauth2.googleapis.com"]);
let ScriptHosts = dynamic(["powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","mshta.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","cmd.exe"]);
let HangulParents = dynamic(["hwp.exe","hword.exe","hcell.exe","hshow.exe","outlook.exe","winword.exe","excel.exe","explorer.exe"]);
let SuspectChain =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (HangulParents)
    | where FileName in~ (ScriptHosts)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | project ProcStart = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName,
              SpawnedProc = FileName, SpawnedPid = ProcessId,
              SpawnedCmd = ProcessCommandLine,
              Parent = InitiatingProcessFileName;
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (ScriptHosts)
| where RemoteIPType == "Public"
| where RemoteUrl has_any (CloudC2Hosts)
| where InitiatingProcessFolderPath !startswith @"C:\Program Files\"
     and InitiatingProcessFolderPath !startswith @"C:\Program Files (x86)\"
| join kind=inner SuspectChain on $left.DeviceId == $right.DeviceId,
                                  $left.InitiatingProcessId == $right.SpawnedPid
| where Timestamp between (ProcStart .. ProcStart + 10m)
| summarize ConnCount = count(),
            FirstSeen = min(Timestamp),
            LastSeen  = max(Timestamp),
            Endpoints = make_set(RemoteUrl, 20),
            Cmds      = make_set(SpawnedCmd, 5)
            by DeviceName, AccountName, Parent, SpawnedProc
| where ConnCount >= 3
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let CloudC2Hosts = dynamic(["api.pcloud.com","eapi.pcloud.com","cloud-api.yandex.net","webdav.yandex.ru","disk.yandex.com","api.dropboxapi.com","content.dropboxapi.com","www.googleapis.com","oauth2.googleapis.com"]);
let ScriptHosts = dynamic(["powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","mshta.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","cmd.exe"]);
let HangulParents = dynamic(["hwp.exe","hword.exe","hcell.exe","hshow.exe","outlook.exe","winword.exe","excel.exe","explorer.exe"]);
let SuspectChain =
    ImProcessCreate
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where ParentProcessName has_any (HangulParents)
    | where TargetProcessName has_any (ScriptHosts)
    | where ActorUsername !endswith "$"
    | project ProcStart = TimeGenerated, DvcHostname, ActorUsername,
              SpawnedProc = TargetProcessName, SpawnedPid = TargetProcessId,
              SpawnedCmd = TargetProcessCommandLine,
              Parent = ParentProcessName;
ImNetworkSession
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where ActingProcessName has_any (ScriptHosts)
| where Url has_any (CloudC2Hosts) or DstHostname has_any (CloudC2Hosts)
| join kind=inner SuspectChain on $left.DvcHostname == $right.DvcHostname
| where TimeGenerated between (ProcStart .. ProcStart + 10m)
| summarize ConnCount = count(),
            FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
            LastSeen  = max(TimeGenerated),
            Endpoints = make_set(coalesce(Url, DstHostname), 20),
            Cmds      = make_set(SpawnedCmd, 5)
            by DvcHostname, ActorUsername, Parent, SpawnedProc
| where ConnCount >= 3
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.rationale: ScarCruft / Reaper has used pCloud, Yandex Disk, Dropbox and Google Drive REST APIs as RokRat / DOGCALL / M2RAT C2 substrate since at least 2018 — this is one of their most distinctive long-running TTPs (documented by Cisco Talos, Kaspersky, AhnLab, ESET). The Hangul-Office parent process pivot specifically targets their KR-focused HWP/HWPX delivery chains, while the script-interpreter-hits-cloud-

ucs.title: [LLM] APT37 spearphishing LNK chain — disk-image / archive-extracted .lnk spawning mshta/powershell that drops a decoy + RokRat loader
ucs.description: Hunts ScarCruft's 2022-2024 LNK initial-access pattern (M2RAT, RokRat, ROKRAT-via-LNK campaigns reported by AhnLab/ASEC, Mandiant, Check Point): a .lnk delivered inside an ISO/IMG/ZIP/RAR is double-clicked from a user folder; the LNK invokes a living-off-the-land binary (mshta, powershell, cmd /c findstr, or rundll32) that carves an encoded payload from the LNK itself or a sibling decoy doc, then writes shellcode/DLL into AppData and pivots to scheduled-task or Run-key persistence. Pivots on the LNK→LOLBin→file-drop chain originating from a mounted-image or archive-staging folder.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdlines values(Processes.process_path) as paths from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name="explorer.exe" Processes.process_name IN ("mshta.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","rundll32.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","hh.exe") (Processes.parent_process_path="*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\*" OR Processes.parent_process_path="*\\Downloads\\*" OR Processes.parent_process_path="*\\Desktop\\*" OR match(Processes.parent_process_path,"^[D-Z]:\\\\")) by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.parent_process_name Processes.parent_process_path _time span=10s | rename Processes.* as * | where like(cmdlines,"%findstr%") OR like(cmdlines,"%FromBase64String%") OR like(cmdlines,"%-EncodedCommand%") OR like(cmdlines,"%.lnk%") OR like(cmdlines,"%mshtml%") OR like(cmdlines,"%javascript:%") OR like(cmdlines,"%vbscript:%") | join type=inner dest [| tstats summariesonly=true count from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where (Filesystem.file_path="*\\AppData\\Roaming\\*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\Public\\*") (Filesystem.file_name="*.dll" OR Filesystem.file_name="*.exe" OR Filesystem.file_name="*.scr" OR Filesystem.file_name="*.bat" OR Filesystem.file_name="*.cab") Filesystem.process_name IN ("mshta.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","rundll32.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe") by Filesystem.dest Filesystem.file_name Filesystem.file_path Filesystem.process_name | rename Filesystem.* as *] | stats min(firstTime) as firstTime values(cmdlines) as cmdlines values(paths) as paths values(file_name) as dropped_files values(file_path) as drop_paths by dest user process_name parent_process_name parent_process_path | convert ctime(firstTime)
ucs.kql:
let LolBins = dynamic(["mshta.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","rundll32.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","hh.exe","regsvr32.exe"]);
let StagingFolders = dynamic([@"\AppData\Local\Temp\", @"\Downloads\", @"\Desktop\", @"\AppData\Roaming\Microsoft\Windows\INetCache\"]);
let LnkChain =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "explorer.exe"
    | where FileName in~ (LolBins)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where InitiatingProcessFolderPath has_any (StagingFolders)
         or InitiatingProcessFolderPath matches regex @"(?i)^[D-Z]:\\"
    | where ProcessCommandLine has_any (".lnk", "findstr", "FromBase64String", "-EncodedCommand",
                                        "-enc ", "javascript:", "vbscript:",
                                        "mshtml,RunHTMLApplication", "DownloadString",
                                        "Invoke-Expression", " iex ", "::Load(", "shellcode")
    | project ChainTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName,
              LolBin = FileName, LolBinPid = ProcessId,
              LolBinCmd = ProcessCommandLine,
              Origin = InitiatingProcessFolderPath;
LnkChain
| join kind=inner (
    DeviceFileEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where ActionType in ("FileCreated", "FileModified")
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (LolBins)
    | where FolderPath has_any (@"\AppData\Roaming\", @"\AppData\Local\Temp\", @"\Public\", @"\ProgramData\")
    | where FileName endswith ".dll" or FileName endswith ".exe"
         or FileName endswith ".scr" or FileName endswith ".bat"
         or FileName endswith ".cab" or FileName endswith ".dat"
    | project DropTime = Timestamp, DeviceId,
              DroppedFile = FileName, DropPath = FolderPath,
              DropProcId = InitiatingProcessId, DropSha = SHA256
  ) on DeviceId
| where DropTime between (ChainTime .. ChainTime + 5m)
| where DropProcId == LolBinPid
| summarize FirstSeen = min(ChainTime),
            LastDrop = max(DropTime),
            Cmds = make_set(LolBinCmd, 5),
            DroppedFiles = make_set(strcat(DropPath, DroppedFile), 10),
            Hashes = make_set(DropSha, 10)
            by DeviceName, AccountName, LolBin, Origin
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let LolBins = dynamic(["mshta.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","rundll32.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","hh.exe","regsvr32.exe"]);
let StagingFolders = dynamic([@"\AppData\Local\Temp\", @"\Downloads\", @"\Desktop\", @"\AppData\Roaming\Microsoft\Windows\INetCache\"]);
let LnkChain =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where ParentProcessName endswith "\\explorer.exe"
    | where NewProcessName has_any (LolBins)
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | where ParentProcessName has_any (StagingFolders)
         or ParentProcessName matches regex @"(?i)^[D-Z]:\\"
    | where CommandLine has_any (".lnk", "findstr", "FromBase64String", "-EncodedCommand",
                                  "-enc ", "javascript:", "vbscript:",
                                  "mshtml,RunHTMLApplication", "DownloadString",
                                  "Invoke-Expression", " iex ", "::Load(", "shellcode")
    | project ChainTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, Account,
              LolBin = NewProcessName, LolBinPid = NewProcessId,
              LolBinCmd = CommandLine, Origin = ParentProcessName;
LnkChain
| join kind=inner (
    ImFileEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where EventType in ("FileCreated", "FileModified")
    | where ActingProcessName has_any (LolBins)
    | where TargetFilePath has_any (@"\AppData\Roaming\", @"\AppData\Local\Temp\", @"\Public\", @"\ProgramData\")
    | where TargetFileExtension in~ ("dll","exe","scr","bat","cab","dat")
    | project DropTime = TimeGenerated, DvcHostname,
              DroppedFile = TargetFileName, DropPath = TargetFilePath,
              DropSha = TargetFileSHA256
  ) on $left.Computer == $right.DvcHostname
| where DropTime between (ChainTime .. ChainTime + 5m)
| summarize FirstSeen = min(ChainTime),
            LastDrop = max(DropTime),
            Cmds = make_set(LolBinCmd, 5),
            DroppedFiles = make_set(strcat(DropPath, "\\", DroppedFile), 10),
            Hashes = make_set(DropSha, 10)
            by Computer, Account, LolBin, Origin
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: APT37 ScarCruft LNK Chain - Explorer Spawns LOLBin from Staging Folder With Carving Indicators
id: 8e6e0a72-3c5d-4f4b-9d22-apt37lnkv1
status: experimental
description: Detects APT37 (ScarCruft / Reaper) spearphishing LNK initial-access chain where explorer.exe spawns a LOLBin out of a user staging folder (Temp / Downloads / Desktop / mounted ISO drive letter) with command-line tokens consistent with carving an embedded payload from the LNK or a sibling decoy.
references:
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0067/
  - https://asec.ahnlab.com/en/47622/
  - https://blog.talosintelligence.com/rokrat-analysis-fileless-load/
author: SOC detection engineering
date: 2026/05/05
tags:
  - attack.initial_access
  - attack.execution
  - attack.t1566.001
  - attack.t1204.002
  - attack.t1059.001
  - attack.t1218
  - attack.g0067
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_parent:
    ParentImage|endswith: '\explorer.exe'
  selection_child:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\mshta.exe'
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\pwsh.exe'
      - '\cmd.exe'
      - '\rundll32.exe'
      - '\wscript.exe'
      - '\cscript.exe'
      - '\hh.exe'
      - '\regsvr32.exe'
  selection_origin:
    ParentImage|contains:
      - '\AppData\Local\Temp\'
      - '\Downloads\'
      - '\Desktop\'
      - '\AppData\Roaming\Microsoft\Windows\INetCache\'
  selection_carving:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - '.lnk'
      - 'findstr'
      - 'FromBase64String'
      - '-EncodedCommand'
      - '-enc '
      - 'javascript:'
      - 'vbscript:'
      - 'mshtml,RunHTMLApplication'
      - 'DownloadString'
      - 'Invoke-Expression'
      - ' iex '
  filter_machine_account:
    User|endswith: '$'
  condition: selection_parent and selection_child and selection_origin and selection_carving and not filter_machine_account
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate installer scripts double-clicked from a removable drive
  - IT admin running encoded PowerShell from a user share
level: high
ucs.rationale: APT37 has been the most prolific KR-state user of double-extension / ISO-wrapped LNK lures in 2022-2024 — AhnLab ASEC's M2RAT and Goldbackdoor write-ups, Check Point's 'No Pineapple' coverage of Korean-targeted RokRat, and Mandiant TEMP.Reaper reporting all describe the same chain: LNK from an extracted archive or mounted IMG/ISO uses cmd /c findstr / certutil / mshta / pwsh -enc to carve a base64
_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID
